About Us

Teki Solves, established in May 2024, is a leader in digital solutions and technological innovation. We specialize in empowering individuals and businesses by merging creativity with cutting-edge technology. Our services include digital product development, software development tutoring, and tailored freelance services.

At Teki Solves, our mission is to deliver high-quality, innovative solutions that enhance user experiences and drive digital transformation. Whether you need a custom digital product, expert tutoring in software development, or freelance tech services, we are here to bring your vision to life.

Freelance Services

I will customize wordpress plugins to fit your needs

I will create a custom wordpress website

I will provide expert API development and integration

I will develop your custom mobile app
